objective: Test whether positive-only OPSD has token-localized correctness signal on hidden-correct versus visible-pass hidden-wrong code near-misses.

primary_gate.statistic: same-prefix teacher logprob preference for correct branch over wrong branch
primary_gate.primary_hint: retrieved verified algorithm used by the hidden-correct adaptation
primary_gate.success_condition: weak-hint preference is positive on task-specific forks and exceeds shuffled-hint control

supporting_metrics: token-level positive pressure mass by bucket
correct rollout versus wrong rollout gap means
